item.title: It’s a blind corner that’s poorly lit, 4th June
item.description:
It’s a blind corner and several near misses with cyclists coming the other way It’s not very well lit
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Elmbridge, Gloucester

item.title: Excessive grass growth, 4th June
item.description:
Abbotswood estate in Brockworth, estate wide.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abbotswood is a mess!, 4th June
item.description:
The grass around abbotswood is getting out if hand. It looks an absolute mess. We pay council for this to be kept tidy so tidy it! You denied us putting in a dropped curb so we could convert our front garden into off road parking because the grass is so called green space. If it is such precious green space then why aren't you looking after it! We have to walk across it to get to our cars. Its nearly as tall as my young children. If its wet they are soaked before they even get in the car and we are lucky if they dont stand in dog poo where owners can't pick it up. Im pretty sure we live in a housing estate. Not on the verge of the m5! Sort it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge dumped on Priory Street, 4th June
item.description:
Small fridge flytipped on Priory Street, opposite wellington place

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Priory Parade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several pot holes and damaged surface around junction, 4th June
item.description:
Junction between windyrige road and Swindon road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windyridge Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain opposite Dunalley Primary School blocked, flooding to road., 4th June
item.description:
Drain outside Parkway, and across the road from Dunalley Primary School, is blocked, and is flooding into the road. Large amount of debris built up along this part of the road and into drain following heavy rainfall earlier in the week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Drive, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 4th June
item.description:
Drain on Brighton Road near joining of Hewlett Road, next to the florist.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Brighton Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Enormous pothole in access road to rear of court road, 4th June
item.description:
Between Brockworth Community Centre and 38/40 The Parade in line with the pavement in front of 38/40 Court Road and the pavement opposite, there is an extremely large pot hole probably some 3 metres long and about a metre wide. Another pointer that this is within the highway rather than part of access road is the double yellow lines which end at the corner of the property. I have also attached an extract of the List of Streets mapping and this also suggests its within the curtailage of the highway. Can you urgently arrange for this to be repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Court Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass, 4th June
item.description:
All grass verges along abbotswood road are very over grown and messy! Makes it impossible for people to pick up dog poo which me and my children have unfortunately stood in!! We also park along the road. The grass has made it almost impossible to get out the car that side so I’m having to get my kids out in the road which becomes very busy and unsafe. I pay council tax for this to be sorted! Cut the grass or drop my tax bill please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Dear Max, We love trees and cherish their continued presence in our community. However, the horse chestnut on the grass verge to the left of our house, which has been home to us since 31.03.84 l, is now massive. In the 40 years that we have lived at 38, Moorend Park Road, I can’t recall it having ever been pruned. Many of the branches overhang our garden blocking out sunlight. There are telephone wires which cross - cross through the branches too- not sure how safe that is. I have periodically contacted h the Cheltenham Borough Council to ask for this tree to be pruned but to date I have had no response nor any action., 4th June
item.description:
38 Moorend Park Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Moorend Park Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath turning into a death trap for the elderly and disabled, 4th June
item.description:
Location shown on map, this is the thin strip that people need to walk in order to access shops, or the doctor. Some from the nearby old people's home can hardly walk. It was already reported and you did NOTHING, other than passing it on - and silence! The grass is now so tall that, when it rains and it is pushed to the ground, you cannot see where you walk. There is an elevated man hole cover that people fall over, when it is invisible. Please send out someone with a petrol strimmer to clear this at once, as a matter of absolute emergency, else you will be held responsible for possible injuries. There are a number of issues attached, but deal with what is most urgent and dangerous immediately, please. Clear it and charge Gateway for the job. They need to be taken to court. This simply cannot be allowed like this. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 4th June
item.description:
Outside number 23
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
